title: Diverging Demographic Charts
text: Difference in fire-affected vs. high-wildfire-risk population shares, pooled 2000-2024

title: Correlations
text:
Numeric Values Compared











Numeric & Categorical Values Compared











Categorical Values Compared

title: Demographic Time Series
text:
In each plot, the colored, solid line represents the median value for the metric across wildfire-affected census tracts. The colored ribbon ranges from the 25th to the 75th percentile for that metric.
The same is show for “at risk” census tracts (the 90th percentile of tracts nationally by WHP) in grey, with the dashed line showing the median.

title: Demographic Time Series
text:
Vehicle Availability





Share of fire-affected households with no vehicle access, by USFS region and year

title: Demographic Time Series
text:

title: Demographic Time Series
text:
Housing Cost Burden





Cost-burdened households (>=50% income on housing) near wildfire burn zones, by USFS region and year
